title: Recyclables
description: Recycle tools and items back into their materials by smelting them!
body:
Adds recycling to minecraft with a bunch of smelting options! These include:

Iron tools & armor (including shears) >> iron ingot

Chainmail armor >> iron nugget

Leather armor >> leather

Arrows >> iron nuggets

Diamond tools & armor >> diamond

All trims and upgrade template >> diamond

Netherite tools & armor >> netherite ingot

Rotten flesh >> leather

Flower pot >> brick

Stone tools >> cobblestone
